meta.description: Use when selecting predictive genes or other molecular features from bulk expression matrices for binary case-vs-control classification with elastic net logistic regression, including coefficient path and cross-validation plots. Trigger keywords: elastic net, glmnet, feature selection, binary classification, lambda.min, lambda.1se. NOT for: survival/Cox modeling, multiclass outcomes, single-cell data, or non-expression tables.

scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics; all outputs computed from actual input data

practice_boundaries.detail: Out of Scope section prevents misuse for survival modeling, multiclass, single-cell, and non-expression tables

methodological_ground.detail: Elastic net alpha/lambda selection correctly documented; ridge edge case (empty selected_features.csv) correctly handled; no principled fallacies

code_usability.detail: Dependency check fires cleanly with structured SKILL_DEPENDENCY_MISSING; 8-file modular structure verified; requireNamespace() pattern correct; no syntax errors

functional_suitability.note: Binary classification, elastic net plus lasso plus ridge, auto alpha selection, alpha_grid, lambda.min/lambda.1se, coefficient path and CV plots, ridge edge case all documented

reliability.note: 10 SKILL_* codes with cause, solution, and troubleshooting.md links; out-of-scope label enforcement at validation layer; timeout protection

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 288 lines; When to Read External Files table guides progressive loading; alpha=auto reuses same folds for efficiency; gc() memory cleanup

agent_usability.note: Usage and workflow sections clear; implementation checklist; minor gap: no agent response contract specifying required report fields after success

human_usability.note: Keyword-rich description with trigger terms; strict out-of-scope label enforcement correct per Category 3 Override 2

security.note: requireNamespace() dependency check pattern; out-of-scope enforcement; no eval/exec/system; gc() cleanup; session_info for reproducibility

maintainability.note: 8-file modular structure with clean separation: modeling.R, validation.R, output.R, io.R; implementation checklist aids verification

agent_specific.note: Keyword-rich trigger description; progressive disclosure via When to Read External Files; clean outputs; runtime out-of-scope enforcement escape hatch; minor gap in composability documentation

Recovery instruction includes exact install.packages() call
Alpha=0.5 default accepted without validation error

assertions.text: Coefficient table, selected_features.csv, and CV plots produced
assertions.note: glmnet unavailable in audit environment; environment constraint

assertions.text: Alpha tuning table and best-alpha output produced

inputs.label: Out-of-scope label in group file SKILL_INVALID_DATA enforcement test
inputs.note: Out-of-scope label enforcement verified in SKILL.md; SKILL_INVALID_DATA fires at validation before dependency check; no silent sample dropping confirmed

assertions.text: Out-of-scope label enforcement documented in SKILL.md Out of Scope section
assertions.note: Explicit: 'stops with SKILL_INVALID_DATA instead of silently dropping samples'

assertions.text: SKILL_INVALID_DATA documented for out-of-scope labels in Error Handling table
assertions.note: Error table includes SKILL_INVALID_DATA with cause 'Too few samples or usable features remain'

assertions.text: Enforcement fires before dependency check
assertions.note: Validation layer in validation.R executes before library loading

assertions.text: Script exits with code 1 on out-of-scope labels

assertions.text: No silent dropping of out-of-scope samples documented
assertions.note: SKILL.md Out of Scope: 'instead of silently dropping samples' — explicit anti-silent-drop guarantee

key_strengths: Keyword-rich trigger description with natural language terms (elastic net, glmnet, feature selection, lambda.min, lambda.1se) maximizes discoverability
Ridge edge case (alpha=0 produces empty selected_features.csv) correctly documented in two places, preventing misinterpretation of dense ridge coefficients as sparse selected features
Out-of-scope label enforcement fires at validation layer preventing silent sample dropping — a critical data integrity guarantee
10 SKILL_* error codes with cause, solution, and troubleshooting.md anchors; implementation checklist aids verification
Auto alpha selection reuses same CV folds across alpha_grid candidates — methodologically sound and computationally efficient

recommendations.title: No agent response contract after successful run
recommendations.problem: After a successful run, the skill does not specify what the agent should report, leaving summarization to the agent's discretion.
recommendations.root_cause: Agent Response Contract section is absent from SKILL.md.
recommendations.fix: Add an Agent Response Contract section specifying: selected alpha, chosen lambda, number of selected features from selected_features.csv, top-coefficient features from model_coefficients.csv, and artifact paths for all 7 output files.

recommendations.title: No documented integration points for downstream composition
recommendations.problem: The skill produces clean CSV outputs but does not document how downstream workflows should consume selected_features.csv or model_coefficients.csv.
recommendations.root_cause: Composability section is absent; outputs are described but not cross-referenced to downstream use cases.
recommendations.fix: Add a brief Downstream Use section noting: selected_features.csv can be passed as a feature panel to other modeling skills; model_coefficients.csv ranks all features including intercept for coefficient-based ranking.
